authors.author: Darrell Evans
Darrell Evans
Lass den Schwachen sagen (Sende Deinen Geist)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let the poor man say I am rich in him Let the lost man say I am found in him Let the river flow

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let the blind man say I can see again Let the dead man say I am born again Let the river flow Let the river flow Let the river flow Let the river flow

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Holy Spirit come Move in power Let the river flow Let the river flow
